text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 258 

PRE_ICL_LTCP_COINS_1M 

LABEL: Pre-ICL Long Term Care Pharmacy Coinsurance for One-Month Supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-insurance percentage for a one-month supply of the drugs 
on this tier, using long term care pharmacy (LTCP) during the pre-initial coverage limit (ICL) phase of 
the Part D benefit. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE:
